en.e: This bar is full of yahoos.

vi: người thô lỗ cục cằn; (thành ngữ) thô lỗ cục cằn
thái độ thô lỗ cục cằn

en.d: any of various trees having yellowish wood or yielding a yellow extract
the yellow wood of any of various yellowwood trees
West Indian evergreen with medium to long leaves
any of numerous evergreen trees or shrubs having red cup-shaped berries and flattened needlelike leaves
en.e: I especially like the durable fine-grained light brown or red wood of the English yew for cabinetwork and archery bows.

en.d: tropical American aroid having edible tubers that are cooked and eaten like yams or potatoes
ubiquitous strong-scented mat-forming Eurasian herb of wasteland, hedgerow or pasture having narrow serrate leaves and small usually white florets
coarse annual grass having fingerlike spikes of flowers
any of several evergreen plants of the genus Yucca, typically characterized by tall, stout stems and a terminal cluster of white flowers
en.e: In certain climates, yucca grows wild year-round.

en.d: any of various single-celled fungi that reproduce asexually by budding or division
a commercial leavening agent containing yeast cells

vi: men (bia, rượu, bột làm bánh mì…)

en.d: a unit of information equal to 1024 zebibytes or 2^80 bytes
a unit of information equal to 1000 zettabytes or 10^24 bytes
a unit of information equal to 1024 zebibytes or 2^80 bytes
en.e: How many yobibytes of data do we have?

en.d: a unit of information equal to 1000 zettabits or 10^24 bits
en.e: I am calculating how many yottabits of information our company has.

en.d: a unit of information equal to 1024 zebibits or 2^80 bits
en.e: My drive can store more yobibits than yours.

en.d: the basic unit of money in China

vi: đơn vị tiền tệ của Đài Loan

en.d: an infectious tropical disease resembling syphilis in its early stages
a form of dichromacy characterized by lowered sensitivity to yellow light
en.e: My yellow-blindness was discovered when I got a vision test for my driver license.

en.d: a highly infectious disease of rodents, especially rabbits and squirrels, and sometimes transmitted to humans by ticks or flies or by handling infected animals
en.e: While exploring the forests of Japan, I came across a squirrel with yatobyo.

en.d: nervous tension that causes an athlete to fail, especially causing golfers to miss short putts
en.e: To avoid the yips, I changed my style of putting.

vi: (từ Mỹ,nghĩa Mỹ), (thông tục) sự cãi lại

en.d: in cosmology, the original matter that, according to the big bang theory, existed before the formation of the chemical elements
en.e: The ylem existed before atoms formed from electrons, neutrons and protons.

en.d: a soft silvery metallic element
a silvery metallic element that is common in rare-earth minerals
the time that has elapsed
en.e: We have not heard that song since yesteryear.

en.d: time long past
en.e: The card games of yore are mostly forgotten.

vi: thời trước đây đã lâu; thời xưa

en.d: an impure mixture of uranium oxides obtained during the processing of uranium ore
en.e: This yellowcake could be turned into a weapon.

en.d: to dye fabric before it is spun
en.e: I yard-dye the fabric for our company.

en.d: to complain whiningly
en.e: The kids yammered about getting socks for Christmas again.

en.d: to cry loudly, as of animals
en.e: The yammering coyotes kept us awake in the tent all night long.

vi: nói ầm ĩ và liên miên

en.d: to complain whiningly
en.e: The children yawped to their parents about eating brussels sprouts.

en.d: to make a raucous noise
en.e: The students were yawping at a party.

en.d: to emit long loud cries
en.e: The dog is yauping.

en.d: to pull, or move with a sudden movement
en.e: I yanked the table cloth off the table, leaving the plates and silverware in place.

en.d: a quick, sudden pulling movement
en.e: The yank on the rope caught me off guard.

en.d: short for yankee i.e. an American, often pejorative
en.e: This cafe is full of drunken yanks.

en.d: to have affection for
en.e: I yearn for them.

en.d: to have a desire for something or someone who is not present
en.e: I yearn to go on a trip abroad.

en.d: to desire strongly or persistently
en.e: The old couple yearned for simpler times.

vi: anh ta khao khát trở về quê
she yearned to return to her native country
cô ta nóng lòng trở về quê cha đất tổ

en.d: a greeting like 'hi'
en.e: Yo, what's up?

en.d: shortened form of "you only live once"
a period of time equal to one septillion seconds, or 10^24
second person plural pronoun, contraction of "you all"
en.e: I don't know about y'all, but I'm ready for bed.

en.d: second person plural pronoun, contraction of "you all"
en.e: I don't know about y'all, but I'm ready for bed.
